# Generative AI Data

Manage OCI Generative AI Data enrichment jobs from Kubernetes with a reviewed job-shaped runtime contract.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `generativeaidata` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-generativeaidata-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-generativeaidata:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-generativeaidata-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to EnrichmentJob while the remaining Generative AI Data job families stay unpublished.
- Kubernetes create calls `GenerateEnrichmentJob`, and Kubernetes delete requests `CancelEnrichmentJob`; the published runtime does not claim the OCI service exposes plain update or delete operations for EnrichmentJob.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
